title: ToolTreaux Safety Lightweight Loud Floating Emergency Whistle - 6 Pack
description:
The ToolTreaux lightweight floating whistles make a loud noise to bring everyone’s attention in the event of an emergency. These whistles are constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that won’t rust or corrode, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it’s lightweight, waterproof, and will stand the test of time, rain, or shine. The lightweight plastic whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate them during an emergency in case you drop them in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for construction workers and outdoor adventurers alike. Our unique design features a clip-on attachment so you can easily affix the whistle to your life jacket, backpack, pocket, or belt

ToolTreaux Safety Lightweight Loud Floating Emergency Whistle - 6 Pack

The ToolTreaux lightweight floating whistles make a loud noise to bring everyone’s attention in the event of an emergency.

Key Features

  • HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION – ToolTreaux survival kit whistles are made of durable, high-quality plastic that won’t rust, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it’s super-lightweight, waterproof, and will stand the test of time
  • SUPER LOUD WHISTLE – Our waterproof whistles blast a loud noise when blown in order to draw everyone’s attention in case of an emergency. The high-pitched sound can be heard from a long distance, making this an essential safety whistle.
  • HIGH VISIBILITY, DESIGNED TO FLOAT – The lightweight whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate the whistle during an emergency in case you drop it in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for construction workers and outdoor adventurers.
  • KEY CHAIN CLIP – Our unique design features a clip-on attachment so you can easily affix it to your life jacket, backpack, pocket or belt. The plastic whistle comes with a lanyard hole as well so you can use it as a keychain!
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Adjustable lanyard and clip on attachment; High visibility orange color; Floats in water; Dimensions: 2” x .5” x .5”; Weight: .01lbs or .16oz (lightweight)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT21-WH36696Q2
  • UPC: 810058486325
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: Medium

These whistles are constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that won’t rust or corrode, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it’s lightweight, waterproof, and will stand the test of time, rain, or shine.

The lightweight plastic whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate them during an emergency in case you drop them in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for construction workers and outdoor adventurers alike.

Our unique design features a clip-on attachment so you can easily affix the whistle to your life jacket, backpack, pocket, or belt. The plastic whistles come with a lanyard hole as well so you can use them as a keychain! They each measure 2” x .5” x .5” and weigh just .16 ounces. Make sure to grab a set of these in case of an emergency!
